name: Flying J Travel Plaza #749 (Carmel Church)
description: Full-service Flying J truck stop at I-95 Exit 104 with roughly 240 truck parking spaces, 12 diesel lanes, showers, Denny's and Cinnabon. Open 24 hours with an on-site CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #435 (Ruther Glen)
description: Love's Travel Stop at I-95 Exit 104 with diesel lanes, truck parking, a restaurant, showers and an on-site CAT Scale. Open 24 hours.

name: TA Ashland (TravelCenters of America)
description: TravelCenters of America at I-95 Exit 92 (Rt. 54) offering BP diesel and gas 24/7, about 183 truck parking spaces, showers, laundry, a service garage and an on-site CAT Scale.

name: TA Richmond (TravelCenters of America)
description: TravelCenters of America at I-95 Exit 89 (Lewistown Rd) with gas and diesel 24/7 and roughly 317 truck parking spaces for overnight parking, showers and a service garage.

name: Sheetz #672 (Woodford/Thornburg)
description: Sheetz travel convenience store at I-95 Exit 118 (Thornburg) with diesel fuel, made-to-order food, and restrooms, listed as a truck-accessible fuel stop on the corridor.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Carmel Church
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Flying J Travel Plaza at I-95 Exit 104 for certified truck weighing.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Ruther Glen
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Love's Travel Stop #435 at I-95 Exit 104 for certified truck weighing.

name: CAT Scale at TA Ashland
description: Certified CAT Scale at the TA Ashland travel center at I-95 Exit 92 for certified truck weighing.

name: Dumfries Weigh Station (Southbound)
description: Virginia DMV fixed weigh and vehicle-inspection station on I-95 southbound at Mile 154 near Dumfries/Montclair. Offers weigh-in-motion and accepts PrePass.

name: Dumfries Weigh Station (Northbound)
description: Virginia DMV fixed weigh/inspection station on I-95 northbound near Dumfries, paired with the southbound MM 154 facility.

name: Ladysmith Safety Rest Area (Southbound)
description: VDOT safety rest area on I-95 southbound at Mile 107 in Caroline County with roughly 45 truck spaces and 35 car spaces, restrooms, open 24/7.

name: Ladysmith Safety Rest Area (Northbound)
description: VDOT safety rest area on I-95 northbound near Mile 108 in Caroline County with car and truck/RV/bus parking and restrooms, open 24/7.

name: Fredericksburg Welcome Center (Southbound)
description: VDOT welcome center/rest area on I-95 southbound at Mile 131 in Spotsylvania County with about 59 car spaces and 21 RV/bus/truck spaces and restrooms.

name: Dale City Safety Rest Area (Northbound)
description: VDOT safety rest area on I-95 northbound at Mile 154 in Prince William County with truck/RV/bus parking and restrooms, open 24/7.

name: Dale City Truck Rest Area (Southbound)
description: VDOT truck-designated rest area on I-95 southbound at Mile 155 in Prince William County providing dedicated truck parking, open 24/7 (paired with the car-only facility at the same milepost).

name: Service Tire Truck Center (STTC) Fredericksburg
description: Commercial truck tire dealer and service center serving the I-95 corridor with emergency truck repair, mobile tire service and semi-truck repair.

name: 2020 Truck and Trailer Repair
description: Commercial truck and trailer shop offering tire repair/replacement and 24/7 mobile roadside assistance along I-95, US-17 and Route 3 in the Fredericksburg area.

name: 95 Truck & Trailer Repair
description: Commercial truck and trailer repair shop near I-95 in Fredericksburg handling heavy-duty truck and trailer service and tire work.

name: Franco Road Service Inc
description: 24-hour mobile roadside service for semi-truck and trailer breakdowns on the I-95 corridor, including new/used tires and suspension repair.

name: Liberty Fleet Solutions (Liberty Equipment)
description: Heavy/medium/light-duty truck repair facility with multiple service bays and diesel mechanics offering tire service and mobile support near I-95 in Fredericksburg.

name: CDS Tractor Trailer Training (Fredericksburg)
description: DMV-approved CDL training center just off I-95 Exit 118 (Thornburg) offering a roughly 4-week Class A program with range and on-road instruction.

name: Truck N Learn CDL Training
description: CDL training school with Woodbridge and Stafford locations offering Class A and Class B training including ELDT classroom and hands-on driving instruction.

name: 2020 CDL Training (Fredericksburg)
description: DMV-approved CDL training school serving Fredericksburg, Stafford, Spotsylvania, Woodbridge and Thornburg with Class A/B training, endorsements and permit prep.

name: Days Inn Carmel Church / Ruther Glen
description: Hotel at I-95 Exit 104 that provides free parking with space for trucks, buses and RVs, plus free breakfast, Wi-Fi and 24-hour front desk.
